name: positioning-pipeline
description: End-to-end product-positioning pipeline. From a company context it generates two Google Gemini Deep Research prompts (a positioning brief + a product-research-persona market brief), renders a copy-and-launch HTML with animated Gemini instructions (select Deep research from the + menu; Share & Export → Copy contents), then — once the research comes back — synthesises three framework-grounded positioning territories (Ries & Trout, April Dunford, Blue Ocean, David C. Baker) as Markdown plus a stylised interactive decision page.
